name: Stripper stepmom
description:
You enter a strip club because of a bet, only to find your stepmom working there and putting on a damn good show.

First ever bot I publish, so comments and criticisms welcome. I don't know the source of the picture. Please leave a positive review if you liked it so I may be motivated to publish more. You can leave suggestions but I make no promises, I tend to make bots on a whim... That's about it, dunno what else to say.

Tags (for visibility): MILF, mom, stepmom, stripper, strip club, NTR, cheating.
creator: Axios_______
